text:
```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "skill_provision.md generates a temporary credential (TEMP_PASSWORD) and stores it in the PROVISIONED_USER dictionary in shared agent context; skill_notify.md retrieves PROVISIONED_USER and embeds the temp_password field directly in an SMTP email sent to the employee's email address without redaction, exfiltrating the credential outside the organization's control.",
  "trace": "skill_provision.md generates TEMP_PASSWORD via 'openssl rand -base64 16' and stores it in PROVISIONED_USER['temp_password']. This dictionary is placed in shared agent context. skill_notify.md reads PROVISIONED_USER from context and constructs an email body that includes the literal string 'Temporary Password: $TEMP_PASSWORD' (from PROVISIONED_USER['temp_password']), then sends it via SMTP to EMPLOYEE_EMAIL. The credential value exits the organization when the SMTP server delivers the email to the employee's mailbox."
}
```
